description: Organised crime group based in Huyton, Liverpool, England, founded in the 1990s by brothers Vincent and Francis Coggins. Involved in large-scale drug trafficking, blackmail, contract killing, and violent crime. Rose to prominence after the arrests of other Liverpool criminals. The group's leader was sentenced to 28 years in prison in 2024.

country_links.evidence_quote: French and Dutch authorities had hacked into the encription of the messaging app and followed their plans closely...
country_links.context: Dutch authorities hacked into EncroChat to monitor the Huyton Firm's plans, indicating the org's use of the platform routed through the Netherlands.

country_links.evidence_quote: The brothers set up a compound in Costa del Sol where they smuggled in drugs like cocaine and heroin through the Port of Liverpool...
country_links.context: The Huyton Firm set up a compound in Costa del Sol, Spain, to smuggle drugs.
